## **Pls know this is not the main place I put my mods at, I ALWAYS put curseforge first and the Easy Ores logo is too big of KB that why the logos are different. the logo on Modrinth is Old!**
### Craftable Ores Mod
## Fabric Need Fabric Api
Transform Your Mining Experience!

Ever found yourself frustrated by the scarcity of diamonds, emeralds, or iron in your world? Look no further! With the Craftable Ores Mod, you can now craft essential ores using simple recipes, bringing a new level of convenience to your gameplay.

Key Features:
- Crafting Recipes: Now you can create diamond, emerald, coal, iron, and more! No more endless mining sessions—get the ores you need when you need them.
- New Recipes Coming Soon: Stay tuned for future updates that will introduce even more crafting recipes for additional ores and materials, expanding your crafting possibilities!

How It Works:
Simply gather the necessary materials and use the crafting table to create your favorite ores. Check the in-game recipe book for a full list of current recipes and keep an eye out for upcoming additions!

Installation:
1. Download the mod from CurseForge or Modrinth.
2. Place the .jar file into your mods folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and enjoy crafting your ores!

Compatibility:
- Works with Minecraft version [1.14.4, 1.15.2, and higher].
- Compatible with major modpacks.
- 1.14.5 & 1.15.2 will no longer be update after 1.0.0

Join the Community!
I would love to hear your feedback and suggestions! share your ideas for new recipes or features.

Get ready to enhance your mining adventures! Download the Craftable Ores Mod today!

## I recommend you use JEI to know the recipes/How to make.
